summary: Games Tab | Hearing Announcement When Focusing on a Postgame/Archive Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Games tab
AND TTS is enabled
AND the game has already ended (Postgame/Archive)

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on a postgame/ archive game tile
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “Final,<Half of the inning + Inning>,  <Away team Name + Away team>, <Home Team Name + Home team score>, X of X items”
